title: senecio scitus
intro: Senecio scitus, also known as woolly leaf ragwort, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Senecio scitus include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, Senecio scitus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, but caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity if ingested in large quantities.
